summary: Strong JD alignment and formatting, but the resume is riddled with fabricated metrics explicitly forbidden by the source brief plus a hallucinated tool (Gerrit/Bitbucket), making it factually indefensible.

issues.issue: Brief explicitly forbids the '82% (45→8 min)' release-cycle-reduction claim — that improvement predates the candidate; he may only claim he sustains ~8-minute deploys.
issues.where: Summary: 'delivering **82% faster release cycles**' AND experience bullet: 'cutting release cycles by **82% (45 → 8 min)**'
issues.suggestion: Replace with 'sustained fast, automated (~8-minute) deployments' — no percentage reduction.

issues.issue: Brief forbids '80% faster provisioning' and '95% drift reduction' — these belong to the original build, not the candidate's work.
issues.where: Summary: '**80% faster provisioning**' AND experience bullet: 'reducing provisioning time **80%** and configuration drift **95%**'
issues.suggestion: Reframe to 'consistent, reproducible provisioning across Dev, Staging, and Production' with no reduction metrics.

issues.issue: Bitbucket and 'Gerrit' appear as CI/CD / code-review tools not in the inventory. Bitbucket is listed only as a VCS in the brief; 'Bitbucket workflows' as a CI/CD pipeline tool and 'Gerrit' entirely are fabrications.
issues.where: Skills 'Bitbucket Workflows'; experience 'Bitbucket workflows'; 'integrated SonarQube quality gates and **Git/Gerrit** code-review workflows'
issues.suggestion: Remove 'Bitbucket Workflows' and 'Gerrit'; use 'Git' code-review workflows only. Keep Bitbucket in VCS row only.

issues.issue: Healthcare project production-scale metrics are flagged prototype-only and must be omitted by default: '500+ concurrent users', '5+ overly permissive roles', '~30% reduced image pull latency'.
issues.where: Healthcare bullets: 'removed **5+ overly permissive roles**', '**~30% reduced image pull latency** while serving **500+ concurrent users**'
issues.suggestion: Remove all three; frame as prototype/PoC for client review per brief section 5.

issues.issue: 'Architected serverless build/deploy system' and 'Designed multi-environment AWS architecture' violate the origination rule — candidate maintained/extended existing systems, not architected them.
issues.where: Salon: 'Architected serverless build/deploy system'; CRM: 'Designed multi-environment AWS architecture'
issues.suggestion: Use 'Maintained and extended a serverless build/deploy system' and 'Operated and extended a multi-environment AWS/EKS platform'.

issues.issue: OpenShift, Istio, ELK Stack, and Datadog are Tier-2 tools to include only if the JD asks. JD lists Istio/service mesh and Datadog as 'nice to have' (OK), but OpenShift and ELK Stack are not requested and appear in bullets.
issues.where: Experience bullet 3: 'Kubernetes (EKS, OpenShift)'; bullet 4: 'Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, ELK Stack, and Datadog'
issues.suggestion: Drop 'OpenShift' and 'ELK Stack' (not in JD). Keep Istio and Datadog since JD lists them as nice-to-have; note skills section omits Istio entirely — add it there for consistency.

issues.issue: Istio is claimed in an experience bullet but absent from the Skills section; conversely OpenShift appears in a bullet but not in Skills. Tool listing is inconsistent between sections.
issues.where: Experience bullet 3 'Istio service mesh' vs Skills 'Containers & Kubernetes: Docker, Kubernetes (EKS), Helm, Karpenter, KEDA, Ingress-NGINX Controller' (no Istio, no OpenShift)
issues.suggestion: Since JD lists Istio as nice-to-have, add Istio to the Containers skill row; remove OpenShift from bullets.

issues.issue: colorScheme is 'teal' (startup/SaaS) but brief default for Cloud/SRE/DevOps enterprise-leaning is Navy; JD is a generic Senior DevOps role. Minor — acceptable but flag.
issues.suggestion: Confirm teal is intended; navy is the brief's default for DevOps/Cloud roles.

issues.issue: JD requires Vault (nice-to-have) and it is in the brief's Tier-1 security stack, but HashiCorp Vault is missing from the Security & Secrets skill row.
issues.where: Skills 'Security & Secrets: AWS Secrets Manager, IAM, KMS, Sealed Secrets, Trivy Operator'
issues.suggestion: Add 'HashiCorp Vault' to the Security & Secrets row — it's JD-requested and defensible.

issues.issue: GitOps and ArgoCD are JD nice-to-haves; ArgoCD appears in bullets/projects but is missing from the CI/CD or Containers skill rows.
issues.suggestion: Add ArgoCD/GitOps to CI/CD or Containers skill row for ATS keyword match.

issues.issue: Title mismatch: JD is 'Senior DevOps Engineer' and candidate has 1+ year — resume title is 'DevOps Engineer' (correct, honest), but ensure no 'Senior' framing creeps in. Also Azure (Fundamentals) included though JD is AWS-only with no multi-cloud mention — brief's Azure gate says skip.
issues.suggestion: Remove 'Azure (Fundamentals)' per the Azure inclusion gate (AWS-only JD, no multi-cloud signal).

issues.issue: Contact line (phone, email, LinkedIn, GitHub, location) is present in cv.md but the generated JSON payload omits header contact fields — verify the renderer injects them.
issues.where: Generated resume JSON has no explicit contact/header block
issues.suggestion: Confirm header with name/phone/email/LinkedIn/GitHub/location renders in the final output.

issues.issue: Once fabricated metrics are removed, several bullets lose their quantified hook; ensure remaining defensible metrics (99.9% uptime, 30% cost, 60%+ build time, RPO<1hr, ~70% toil) carry the impact.
issues.suggestion: Lead bullet 1 with '~8-minute automated deploys across 20+ services' and bullet 2 with the 34-module reproducible IaC framing.

issues.issue: No spelling errors found; 'Dockerised' correctly uses British -ise per brief.
Grammar and punctuation are consistent (all bullets end with periods, parallel action-verb openings). Clean.
